---
name: Bug Report
about: Something broke or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Open the app
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages from the terminal.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Script version: [e.g. v0.15]

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
